sections.paragraph:
and נֶדֶר with suff. נִדְרִי pl. נְדָרִים, נִדְרֵי m.

(1) a vow, Gen 28:20, etc. (also in the Phœn. dial. see Inscr. Melit. 1). נָדַר נְדָרִים to vow vows, see the root שִׁלֵּם נְדָרִים Psa 22:26, and עָשָׂה נְדָרִים to perform vows, Jud. 11:39 .

(2) any thing vowed, avowed sacrifice, Levit. 7:16 22:18 , 21 Lev 22:21 Deu 12:6. Opp. to נְדָּבָה a voluntary gift.
